abilities.name: Demise (Expendable)
abilities.text: After this model is killed, either draw a card or make a Scheme marker in base contact with this model.

abilities.name: U Don't Bite The Hand
abilities.text: When attacking this model, enemies with a friendly Brilliance token may not cheat.

actions.name: Deceiving Touch
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a friendly Brilliance token, it may not cheat fate during this action.
actions.effects: If the duel total is tied, this attack deals +1 damage instead of -1 damage.

triggers.name: Chill
triggers.text: Models damaged by this action gain a Slow token.

actions.name: Lure
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target its Sp toward this model.

triggers.name: The Light Inside
triggers.text: This model or the target gains a Brilliance token.

triggers.name: Desperate Need
triggers.text: When resolving, move the target up to its Sp toward an ally in its LoS instead of toward this model.

triggers.name: Hopeless Revelation
triggers.text: The target gains an Insight token.
